Our professionals advise on finance, litigation, labor, tax, and emerging technology matters across the Midwest and national markets.

Partner, Detroit

Jane advises on mergers, private equity, and corporate governance matters for middle-market and multinational clients.

Associate, Chicago

John represents employers in class actions, wage disputes, and workplace investigations throughout the region.

Alex focuses on commercial finance, restructurings, and lender-side diligence for asset-backed transactions.
